title: Volunteer Career Advisors Initiative
text:
Volunteer Career Advisors Initiative - SupportGoWhere
Volunteer Career Advisors Initiative
Share link
A community-driven effort designed to support you in navigating your career journey with confidence. Launched with the aim of fostering career resilience and growth, the initiative connects you with industry experts from diverse sectors who volunteer their time and expertise.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Get sector-specific career advice from industry veterans and connected to government programme and services
Gain insights into industry trends and skills
Collapse all sections
About this support

Get sector- and occupation-specific career advice from industry veterans

Access insights into industry trends and skills to inform career decisions

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizens or Permanent Residents

How to apply?

Please visit VCA App for more information about the initiative and view the list of Volunteer Career Advisors.

Where can I find help?

View more details

WSG Hotline: 6883 5885

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 23 Mar 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
